allow: Bash(python3 -c "import re,sys; s=open\('exhibition-stradivari.html'\).read\(\); print\('braces balanced:', s.count\('{'\)==s.count\('}'\)\); print\('style blocks:', s.count\('<style>'\), s.count\('</style>'\)\)")
Bash(awk '/<style>/{f=1} f{o+=gsub\(/{/,"{"\); c+=gsub\(/}/,"}"\)} /<\\/style>/{f=0} END{print "open="o" close="c}' exhibition-stradivari.html)
